acquisition method: the t-SIM mode allows the mass spectrometer to detect specific compounds
alkylation reagent: 20 µL of 100 mM CAA were added to the sample
alkylation concentration: 20 µL of 100 mM CAA were added to the sample
cleavage agent: we performed multienzyme digestion of rEPO with both Glu-C and trypsin
collision energy: HCD Stepped collision energies were 10, 20, and 30 V
enrichment method: To enrich the sialylated intact glycopeptides, TiO2 beads were used
fragmentation method: the fragmentation type was set to QTOF/HCD
instrument: samples were analyzed via Q-Exactive plus mass spectrometer
ionization type: The voltage of ion spray was 1.8 kV in the positive mode
